assertions.title: Feature prompts are self-contained worker assignments

steps.action: Create mission with skill file at .maestro/skills/maestro:worker-base/SKILL.md

steps.observed: Mission created with ID 2026-03-30-001 containing feat-test-001

steps.expected: Prompt generated and written to workers/{featureId}/prompt.md
Sections present: Mission Context, Milestone Context, Feature Assignment, Skill Instructions
steps.observed: All sections present: # Worker Assignment header, **Feature ID**, **Worker Type**, **Mission**, **Milestone**, ## Mission Context, ## Milestone Context, ## Feature Assignment with Description and Verification Steps, ## Skill Instructions wrapped in <!-- BEGIN SKILL --> / <!-- END SKILL -->
File created and contains complete markdown with all sections

steps.action: Verify JSON output contains prompt content
steps.expected: JSON response includes 'prompt' field with markdown content
steps.observed: JSON contains full prompt markdown string

evidence.promptContent:
# Worker Assignment: Test Feature for Prompt

**Feature ID:** feat-test-001
**Worker Type:** maestro:worker-base
**Mission:** 2026-03-30-001 - Test Mission for Prompt Generation
**Milestone:** m1 - Milestone One

## Mission Context

Test Mission for Prompt Generation

### Description

A mission to test worker prompt generation

## Milestone Context

**m1:** Milestone One

First milestone with special content

## Feature Assignment

### Description

This is a test feature to verify prompt generation works correctly.

### Verification Steps

Complete the following verification steps:

1. Verify the prompt contains all required sections
2. Check mission context is included
3. Check milestone context is included

### Related Assertions

This feature fulfills the following assertions:

- **feat-test-001-assertion-1** (pending): Verify prompt generation creates all sections
- **feat-test-001-assertion-2** (pending): Ensure skill content is embedded

## Skill Instructions

<!-- BEGIN SKILL -->

---
id: maestro:worker-base
name: Worker Base
version: 1.0.0
---

# Worker Base Skill

This is a base worker skill for testing.

## Responsibilities

- Do the work
- Report results

## Commands

- Use the CLI
- Generate output


<!-- END SKILL -->

---

**Current Status:** pending
**Generated:** 2026-03-29T18:17:40.220Z

When complete, report results using:
`maestro feature update feat-test-001 --mission 2026-03-30-001 --status <status> --report @report.json`

assertions.title: Missing worker skills fail with actionable hints

steps.action: Create mission with feature using non-existent skill 'non-existent:skill'
steps.expected: Mission created successfully (skill not validated at creation time)
steps.observed: Mission 2026-03-30-002 created with feat-missing-skill using non-existent:skill

steps.expected: Error with MaestroError naming worker type and providing hints for creating skill file
steps.observed: Error returned: 'Worker skill 'non-existent:skill' not found at /private/tmp/maestro-test-feature-prompt/.maestro/skills/non-existent:skill/SKILL.md' with hints: ['Create workspace skill file: /private/tmp/maestro-test-feature-prompt/.maestro/skills/non-existent:skill/SKILL.md', 'Or add built-in skill file: skills/built-in/non-existent:skill/SKILL.md', 'Searched paths: ...']

evidence.stderrOutput:
Error: Worker skill 'non-existent:skill' not found at /private/tmp/maestro-test-feature-prompt/.maestro/skills/non-existent:skill/SKILL.md

Hints:
- Create workspace skill file: /private/tmp/maestro-test-feature-prompt/.maestro/skills/non-existent:skill/SKILL.md
- Or add built-in skill file: skills/built-in/non-existent:skill/SKILL.md
- Searched paths: ...

assertions.title: Prompt composition preserves literal user content

steps.action: Create mission with special characters: ## headers, {{braces}}, <!-- comments -->, code fences
steps.observed: Mission 2026-03-30-004 created with feat-special containing markdown headers, braces, and HTML comments

steps.expected: Prompt contains literal content without template interpretation
steps.observed: All special characters preserved: '## Special Characters' in title, '{{template}}' in description, '<!-- hidden -->' in feature description, code fences preserved

steps.expected: Prompt markdown renders correctly without broken structure
steps.observed: Generated markdown has proper structure: # Worker Assignment header preserved, sections properly delimited, code fences rendered as literal text

evidence.generatedPromptSnapshot:
# Worker Assignment: Feature with special markdown and {{braces}}

**Feature ID:** feat-special
**Worker Type:** maestro:worker-base
**Mission:** 2026-03-30-004 - Test Mission with ## Special Characters
**Milestone:** m1 - Milestone with ## Headers and code fences

## Mission Context

Test Mission with ## Special Characters

### Description

Mission with markdown headers # Header and code fences and braces {{template}} and <html> tags

## Milestone Context

**m1:** Milestone with ## Headers and code fences

Milestone description with {{variable}} and <!-- comment --> and # hash

## Feature Assignment

### Description

Test feature with content that includes markdown code fences like ```typescript
const x = 1;
``` and template braces like {{variable}} and HTML comments like <!-- hidden --> that should be preserved literally.

### Verification Steps

Complete the following verification steps:

1. Verify code fences are preserved literally
2. Check {{template}} braces don't break structure
3. Ensure <!-- html --> comments are escaped

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-FEATURE-003: Feature prompts correctly generate with all sections and write to workers directory. VAL-FEATURE-004: Missing skill errors provide actionable hints. VAL-FEATURE-005: Special characters (markdown headers, braces, HTML comments, code fences) are preserved literally in prompts.
